title: limodorum clavatum
intro: Limodorum clavatum, also known as the yellow bird's nest orchid, is a type of orchid native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Limodorum clavatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a dried extract or tincture, and it can also be used in teas and infusions.
